title: Aggregate Live DOI/OA Metadata Connector Plan
offline_safe_notice: This release defines connector contracts and evidence fields but does not run live metadata APIs.

connectors.name: Crossref metadata connector
connectors.purpose: Resolve DOI metadata, publication year, title, publisher, and canonical DOI evidence.
connectors.offline_release_behavior: write connector plan only; do not claim live DOI validation
connectors.risk_notes: Crossref metadata does not prove OA license or figure reuse permission.

connectors.name: OpenAlex discovery connector
connectors.purpose: Cross-check work metadata, venue, concepts, OA status hints, and alternate host pages.
connectors.offline_release_behavior: write connector plan only; no live lookup in release build
connectors.risk_notes: OpenAlex OA flags are discovery aids; license and image reuse still need review.

connectors.name: Unpaywall OA evidence connector
connectors.purpose: Find OA locations, license hints, repository copies, and best OA PDF candidates.
connectors.offline_release_behavior: write connector plan only; no live OA validation in release build
connectors.risk_notes: OA availability does not automatically grant figure reuse; third-party material review is still required.

connectors.name: Publisher / official journal page connector
connectors.purpose: Verify publisher landing page, article license, copyright statement, supplementary material, and policy links.
connectors.offline_release_behavior: record required evidence fields; no live policy extraction in release build
connectors.risk_notes: Publisher pages are mutable and must be checked before extraction or public display.

connectors.name: Institutional / author repository metadata connector
connectors.purpose: Verify author-accepted or repository OA version, repository license, and reuse constraints.
connectors.risk_notes: Repository copies may have different reuse terms than publisher versions.

connector_pipeline: resolve DOI evidence using DOI/Crossref/OpenAlex-style metadata
verify OA status and OA locations using OA metadata connectors
verify publisher or repository page evidence
record exact license text and reuse constraints
send uncertain or mutable cases to human review queue
unlock extraction only when extraction gate report allows it
